# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { createClient } from '@vercel/edge-config';

interface EdgeConfigValues {
  API_KEY: string;
  DB_URL: string;
  FEATURE_FLAGS: {
    enableNewUI: boolean;
    enableBetaFeatures: boolean;
    maintenanceMode: boolean;
    enableAnalytics: boolean;
  };
  RATE_LIMIT: number;
  CACHE_TTL: number;
  ALLOWED_ORIGINS: string[];
}

const DEFAULT_CONFIG: EdgeConfigValues = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAGS: {
    enableNewUI: false,
    enableBetaFeatures: false,
    maintenanceMode: false,
    enableAnalytics: true,
  },
  RATE_LIMIT: 100,
  CACHE_TTL: 3600,
  ALLOWED_ORIGINS: ['https://example.com', 'https://app.example.com'],
};

async function getEdgeConfig(): Promise<EdgeConfigValues> {
  const edgeConfigConnectionString = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

  if (!edgeConfigConnectionString) {
    console.warn('EDGE_CONFIG environment variable not set. Using default configuration.');
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }

  try {
    const edgeConfigClient = createClient(edgeConfigConnectionString);

    const [apiKey, dbUrl, featureFlags, rateLimit, cacheTtl, allowedOrigins] =
      await Promise.all([
        edgeConfigClient.get<string>('API_KEY'),
        edgeConfigClient.get<string>('DB_URL'),
        edgeConfigClient.get<EdgeConfigValues['FEATURE_FLAGS']>('FEATURE_FLAGS'),
        edgeConfigClient.get<number>('RATE_LIMIT'),
        edgeConfigClient.get<number>('CACHE_TTL'),
        edgeConfigClient.get<string[]>('ALLOWED_ORIGINS'),
      ]);

    return {
      API_KEY: apiKey ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY,
      DB_URL: dbUrl ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL,
      FEATURE_FLAGS: featureFlags
        ? { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAGS, ...featureFlags }
        : DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAGS,
      RATE_LIMIT: rateLimit ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.RATE_LIMIT,
      CACHE_TTL: cacheTtl ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.CACHE_TTL,
      ALLOWED_ORIGINS: allowedOrigins ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.ALLOWED_ORIGINS,
    };
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to read from Edge Config:', error);
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }
}

function checkOrigin(request: Request, allowedOrigins: string[]): boolean {
  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');
  if (!origin) return true;
  return allowedOrigins.includes(origin);
}

function validateApiKey(request: Request, validApiKey: string): boolean {
  const authHeader = request.headers.get('authorization');
  if (!authHeader) return false;
  const token = authHeader.replace('Bearer ', '');
  return token === validApiKey;
}

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const config = await getEdgeConfig();

  // Check maintenance mode
  if (config.FEATURE_FLAGS.maintenanceMode) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: 'Service is currently under maintenance. Please try again later.',
      }),
      {
        status: 503,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }

  // Check allowed origins
  if (!checkOrigin(request, config.ALLOWED_ORIGINS)) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Origin not allowed.' }),
      {
        status: 403,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }

  const url = new URL(request.url);
  const pathname = url.pathname;

  // Health check endpoint — no auth required
  if (pathname === '/api/health' || pathname === '/api/config/health') {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'healthy',
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        edgeConfigConnected: !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG,
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }

  // Feature flags endpoint — no auth required
  if (pathname === '/api/features' || pathname === '/api/config/features') {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        features: config.FEATURE_FLAGS,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Cache-Control': `s-maxage=${config.CACHE_TTL}, stale-while-revalidate`,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  // Protected config endpoint — requires API key
  if (pathname === '/api/config' || pathname === '/api/config/full') {
    if (!validateApiKey(request, config.API_KEY)) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Unauthorized. Provide a valid API key via Bearer token.' }),
        {
          status: 401,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        }
      );
    }

    // Mask sensitive values
    const maskedDbUrl = config.DB_URL.replace(
      /\/\/([^:]+):([^@]+)@/,
      '//$1:****@'
    );
    const maskedApiKey = config.API_KEY.substring(0, 8) + '****' + config.API_KEY.substring(config.API_KEY.length - 4);

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        configuration: {
          API_KEY: maskedApiKey,
          DB_URL: maskedDbUrl,
          FEATURE_FLAGS: config.FEATURE_FLAGS,
          RATE_LIMIT: config.RATE_LIMIT,
          CACHE_TTL: config.CACHE_TTL,
          ALLOWED_ORIGINS: config.ALLOWED_ORIGINS,
        },
        source: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'edge-config' : 'defaults',
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Cache-Control': 'no-store',
        },
      }
    );
  }

  // Default response for the root or unmatched paths
  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({
      message: 'Vercel Edge Config Function',
      endpoints: {
        '/api/health': 'Health check (no auth)',
        '/api/features': 'Feature flags (no auth)',
        '/api/config': 'Full configuration (requires Bearer token)',
      },
      edgeConfigAvailable: !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG,
      defaults: {
        API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
        DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
      },
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    }),
    {
      status: 200,
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Cache-Control': `s-maxage=${config.CACHE_TTL}, stale-while-revalidate`,
      },
    }
  );
}
